---
title: "DSP DE Analysis - Kidney Test Dataset"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
editor: visual

params:
  data.folder: "test_datasets/Human_Kidney/"
  de.folder: "test_datasets/Human_Kidney/de/"
  dataset.name: "human_kidney_test_"
---

# DE Analysis

```{r Setup}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(GeomxTools)
library(dplyr)
library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(stringr)
library(PCAtools)
library(readxl)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(DSPWorkflow)
library(standR)
library(SpatialExperiment)

# Source the helper functions
source("DSP_functions.R")

```

### Load the all Input Counts and Annotation

```{r Load Normalized Counts}

normalized.object <- readRDS(file = paste0(params$data.folder,
                                                 params$dataset.name, 
                                                 "q3normalized_object.RDS"))

# Load the StandR RUV object
standr.ruv.object <- readRDS(file = paste0(params$data.folder, "StandR/standr_ruv_object.RDS"))



```

## Comparison Parameters

```{r}
# Parameters shared across all comparisons
common.comparison.parameters <- list(
  
  # DE methods to run.
  # Options:
  #   de.method = "default"
  #   de.method = "standr"
  #   de.method = c("default", "standr")
  #
  # When both are supplied, the functions run them in this order:
  #   default, then standr
  de.method = c("default", "standr"),
  
  # StandR defaults shared across comparisons
  standr = list(
    object.name = "standr.ruv.object",
    covariates = c("ruv_W1", "ruv_W2"),
    block.field = "slide_name",
    filter.by.expr = TRUE,
    estimate.disp.robust = TRUE,
    ebayes.robust = TRUE,
    plot.voom = FALSE,
    sort.by = "P",
    clean.design.names = TRUE,
    print.design.columns = TRUE, 
    remove.batch.for.gsea = FALSE
  ),
  
  # Volcano parameters
  fc.limit = 1,
  padj.limit = 0.05,
  n.labels = 10,

  write.results = TRUE,
  overwrite.results = FALSE,

  title.size = 22,
  legend.coordinates = c(.99, .1),
  x.lab = "Log2 Fold Change",
  y.lab = "-Log10 adjusted p-value",
  dotted.line.color = "black",
  alpha = 1,
  nonDE.color = "gray60",
  upDE.color = "red",
  downDE.color = "blue",
  label.size = 8,
  nolabel.label.size = 4,
  label.color = "black",
  axis.tick.label.size = 20,
  legend.text.size = 20,
  axis.title.size = 20,

  volcano.width = 14,
  volcano.height = 10, 
  
  label.top.genes = FALSE,
  make.nolabel.volcano = TRUE,

  export.volcano = TRUE,
  export.volcano.nolabel = TRUE,
  export.gsea.input = TRUE
)


# Individual comparisons with unique parameters
de.comparisons <- list(
  
  modifyList(
    common.comparison.parameters,
    list(
      contrast.name = "DKD_Tubule_panck_pos_vs_neg",
      heading = "DKD Tubule PanCK Pos vs. Neg",
      
      overwrite.results = FALSE,

      subset.group.1 = list(
        class = c("DKD"),
        region = c("tubule"),
        segment = c("PanCK_pos")
      ),

      subset.group.2 = list(
        class = c("DKD"),
        region = c("tubule"),
        segment = c("PanCK_neg")
      ),

      # Default DSPWorkflow diffExpr parameters
      analysis.type = "Within Groups",
      region.col = "segment",
      regions = c("PanCK_pos", "PanCK_neg"),
      group.col = "region",
      groups = c("tubule"),
      legend.title = "Expression in PanCK+",
      
      # StandR parameters unique to this comparison
      standr = list(
        design.annotation = "segment",
        contrast.numerator = "PanCK_pos",
        contrast.denominator = "PanCK_neg"
      ), 
      
      # Volcano plot
      volcano.title = "DKD Tubule - PanCK Pos vs. Neg",
      label.top.genes = FALSE, 
      
      # GSEA
      gsea.contrast.field = "segment",
      gsea.contrast.levels = c("PanCK_pos", "PanCK_neg")
    )
  ), 

  modifyList(
    common.comparison.parameters,
    list(
      contrast.name = "Glomerulus_DKD_vs_Normal",
      heading = "Glomerulus DKD vs Normal",

      subset.group.1 = list(
        class = c("DKD"), 
        region = c("glomerulus")
      ),

      subset.group.2 = list(
        class = c("normal"), 
        region = c("glomerulus")
      ),

      # Default DSPWorkflow diffExpr parameters
      analysis.type = "Between Groups",
      region.col = "region",
      regions = c("glomerulus"),
      group.col = "class",
      groups = c("DKD", "normal"),
      legend.title = "Expression in DKD",
      
      # StandR parameters unique to this comparison
      # For DKD vs normal, the design annotation should be class.
      standr = list(
        design.annotation = "class",
        contrast.numerator = "DKD",
        contrast.denominator = "normal"
      ), 

      # Volcano plot
      volcano.title = "Glomerulus DKD vs. Normal",
      label.top.genes = FALSE, 
      
      # GSEA
      gsea.contrast.field = "class",
      gsea.contrast.levels = c("DKD", "normal")
    )
  ),
  
  modifyList(
    common.comparison.parameters,
    list(
      contrast.name = "DKD_Glomerulus_vs_Tubule",
      heading = "DKD Glomerulus vs Tubule",

      subset.group.1 = list(
        class = c("DKD"), 
        region = c("glomerulus", "tubule")
      ),

      subset.group.2 = list(
        class = c("DKD"), 
        region = c("glomerulus", "tubule")
      ),

      # Default DSPWorkflow diffExpr parameters
      analysis.type = "Within Groups",
      region.col = "region",
      regions = c("glomerulus", "tubule"),
      group.col = "class",
      groups = c("DKD"),
      legend.title = "Expression in Glomerulus",
      
      # StandR parameters unique to this comparison
      # For glomerulus vs tubule, the design annotation should be region.
      standr = list(
        design.annotation = "region",
        contrast.numerator = "glomerulus",
        contrast.denominator = "tubule"
      ), 

      # Volcano plot
      volcano.title = "DKD Glomerulus vs. Tubule",
      label.top.genes = FALSE, 
      
      # GSEA
      gsea.contrast.field = "region",
      gsea.contrast.levels = c("glomerulus", "tubule")
    )
  )
)


```

## Updated Run Comparisons

```{r}

de.outputs <- run_all_de_comparisons(
  de.comparisons = de.comparisons,
  normalized.object = normalized.object,
  params = params,
  standr.object = standr.ruv.object
)
```
